name: Osso Buco
recipeIngredient: Rind of 1 lemon -- cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the shanks in flour and coat them well.
2. Brown the coated shanks with minced garlic in a hot skillet.
3. Add remaining ingredients to a crockpot.
4. Stir to mix all the ingredients.
5. Place the shanks into the crockpot.
6. Cover the pot and cook on LOW for 10 to 12 hours, or until the shanks are tender.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
8. Serve with pasta.
